message:
🐛 fix: add missing /api prefix to NamespaceManager API calls (#2888)

All namespace API routes (access, create, delete, grant, revoke) were
missing the /api prefix, causing 404 errors since the backend registers
these routes under the /api group.

Fixes #2859, fixes #2866

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
